THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, REGINA M. TRIPP, SHARON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1361 SAN BRUNO AVE, #1, S.F. $625.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $625.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-08-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. FAILURE TO COMPLY PLTF TO HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $5166.54 BACK RENT & DAMAGES, $700- ATT FEES, $225- COSTS. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
